title: Device Home Screen - Battery life
scenario: Battery life display on Device Home Screen shows color-coded icons for headsets, headsets with charge case, and earbuds, with greyed-out icons when headset is turned off.
steps: 1. Pair and connect the headset, start the app, and navigate to the Device Home Screen.
2. Verify that the battery percentage is shown.
4. Verify that the battery icons are greyed out with the last known percentage displayed.
expected: For Headsets: A single battery icon is shown. For Headsets with a Charge case: Two icons marked "H" and "C" are displayed. For Earbuds: Three icons marked "L", "R", and "C" are shown. The battery icon reflects the charge level with color coding: 100%-40% = black (white in dark mode), 39%-20% = yellow, 19%-1% = red, 0% = empty. When the headset is turned off, the battery icons are greyed out with the last known percentage displayed.
